description_long: This potted plant features long, narrow, pointed leaves radiating outward in a spiky, fan-like arrangement, reminiscent of a Yucca or Dracaena species. The leaves are a deep green with subtle variations in tone, giving the plant a natural, slightly wild appearance. Two main clusters of foliage emerge from a pair of slender, upright stems, with the smaller cluster positioned lower and to the side of the main stem. The stems are straight and woody, supporting the dense foliage above. No pot is visible in the images, suggesting the focus is on the plant itself rather than its container. The overall form is sculptural and striking, making it suitable for decorative use in modern urban environments.
description: A spiky, deep green potted plant with long, pointed leaves arranged in two dense clusters on upright woody stems. The plant has a bold, sculptural appearance ideal for urban decor.
description_view_0: The plant is seen with both clusters of spiky leaves clearly visible, the smaller cluster positioned lower and to the right.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the radial spread of the upper leaf cluster, with the lower cluster partially obscured behind the main stem.
description_view_2: The plant appears more compact, with the upper and lower leaf clusters overlapping and the stems slightly angled.
description_view_3: The main stem and upper leaf cluster are most prominent, with the lower cluster almost directly beneath and less visible.
